title: Select map with joined table fields
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.posts_with_author_and_category/0` that inner-joins posts with author and category, and returns a list of maps: `%{post_id, title, author_name, category_name}`. Use named bindings and reference them in the select map. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Three-way join with a structured map select. Many pieces to assemble correctly.
